Class Ball

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Entity
model.entity.enemy.Enemy
model.entity.enemy.entities.Ball
public class Ball extends Enemy
Ball is an Enemy that represents a simple floating ball that continuously chase the Player.

  • Constructor Details

    • Ball

      public Ball(float x, float y)
      Ball constructor that sets it's hitbox and atkbox
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to be place in
      y - Position y to be place in

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(Player player, int[][] lvData, Optional<LiftManager> lfData)
      Updates the position and the atkbox if isn't destroyed
      Parameters:
      player - Used to read the player position for the chase
      lvData - Used to read the level collision
      lfData - Used to read the lifts collision in the level

    • destruction

      public void destruction()
      Destroys the ball

    • isDestroyed

      public boolean isDestroyed()
      Destruction check
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the state of the ball

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Put the ball in the original state
